title: Hand Decorated Easter Bunny LED Candle – Decoupage Rabbit Family

metrics.description: Easter themed candle with hand painted details that will bring festive mood to your home! The candle is decorated by hand using thermal decoupage technique. Can be made as traditional candle or as a LED one. As the products are hand decorated, there may be minor differences in the details from the example shown. All of the candles can be made both as LED candles and as traditional ones depending on your preferences. Captions, names and wishes can also be added. Please contact me if the type of candle that you want to order is not available in the option bar. Thank you!

dynamicFeatures.customization: Personalization available, including captions, names, and wishes.
dynamicFeatures.ledCandleDetails: Simulates real flame, made from paraffin wax, uses 3 AAA batteries (not included). Timer and remote control can be added via separate listings.

title: Candle file EASTER BUNNY floral greeting, spring, flowers, bunnies, Easter, waterslide film, candle sticker, candle tattoo, PDF, JPG, watercolor

metrics.description:
CANDLE FILE FLOWER GREETING FROM THE EASTER BUNNY FOR A4 PRINT ON WATER SLIDE FILM
The Easter candle file "FLOWER GREETINGS FROM THE EASTER BUNNY" contains various coordinated motifs in watercolor, graphics and lettering, which can all be combined well with each other and leave plenty of room for your own creativity. Depending on the combination, the graphic lettering, the elegant watercolor flowers and the cute Easter bunnies can be used to create simple, elegant or cute, playful candle motifs.
PLEASE NOTE: This is NOT a finished product, but a digital print template with multiple uses on one A4 page.
After downloading, the PDF (or JPG) only needs to be printed 1:1 on waterslide film. Printing and processing is carried out according to the instructions of the manufacturer of the respective film.
The finished printed motifs are cut out with as little border as possible, briefly soaked in water and applied to the candles according to personal taste.
The candle file is available for download as a DIN A4 page in PDF format and as a high-resolution JPG.

dynamicFeatures.usageLicense: Personal license for private use (commercial license available separately)
dynamicFeatures.applicationMethod: Print on waterslide film, cut out, soak in water, apply to candles

title: Western Digital 10TB WD Red Plus NAS Internal Hard Drive HDD - 7200 RPM, SATA 6 GB/s, CMR, 512 MB Cache, 3.5" - WD100EFGX

metrics.description: Packed with power to handle the small- to medium-sized business NAS environments and increased workloads for SOHO customers, WD Red Plus is ideal for archiving and sharing, as well as RAID array rebuilding on systems using ZFS and other file systems. Built and tested for up to 8-bay NAS systems, these drives give you the flexibility, versatility, and confidence in storing and sharing your precious home and work files. About this item Available in capacities ranging from 1-14TB with support for up to 8 bays.Data Transfer Rate:6Gbps.Specific uses: Business Supports up to 180 TB/yr workload rate | Workload Rate is defined as the amount of user data transferred to or from the hard drive. Workload Rate is annualized (TB transferred ✕ (8760 / recorded power-on hours)). Workload Rate will vary depending on your hardware and software components and configurations. NASware firmware for compatibility Small or medium business NAS systems in a 24x7 environment, Compatibility: Unlike desktop drives, these drives are specifically tested for compatibility with NAS systems for optimum performance. 3-year limited warranty › See more product details

title: Samsung Galaxy S25 Cell Phone, 128GB AI Smartphone, Unlocked Android, AI Camera, Fast Processor, ProScaler Display, Long Battery Life, 2025, Icyblue (Renewed)

metrics.description: Experience the future in your hands with the Samsung Galaxy S25, combining cutting-edge AI, stunning design, and powerful performance. Featuring a 6.2″ Dynamic AMOLED 2X display with ultra-smooth 120 Hz refresh rate, the Galaxy S25 delivers vivid visuals indoors and outdoors. Its Snapdragon 8 Elite processor and all-day 4,000 mAh battery keep you powered through work and play, while the triple-lens camera system (50 MP wide, 12 MP ultra-wide, and 10 MP telephoto) captures every detail with breathtaking clarity. Enhanced by Galaxy AI tools like Instant Slow-Mo and Auto Edit, your creativity and productivity reach new heights all wrapped in a sleek, durable design. About this item 6.2" Dynamic LTPO AMOLED 2X QHD+, 120Hz Adaptive Refresh Rate, HDR10+, 1080x2340px, Android 15, up to 7 major Android upgrades, One UI 7 128GB, 12GB RAM, No SD Card Slot, Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite (3nm), Octa-Core, Adreno 830 GPU, 4000mAh Battery Rear Camera: 50MP, f/1.8, wide + 10MP, f/2.4, telephoto + 12MP, f/2.2, ultrawide, Front Camera: 12MP, f/2.2, wide 2G: 850/900/1800/1900, 3G: UMTS 1(2100)/2(1900)/4(AWS)/5(850)/8(900), 4G LTE: 1/2/3/4/5/7/8/12/13/14/18/19/20/25/26/28/29/30/38/39/40/41/48/66/71, 5G: N1/2/5/7/25/28/41/66/71/77/78/257/258/260/261 SA/NSA/Sub6/mmWave - Nano-SIM + eSIM + eSIM (max 2 at a time) US Model - Compatible with Most GSM Carriers like AT&T, T-Mobile, MetroPCS, etc. Will Also work with CDMA Carriers Such as Verizon, Straight Talk. › See more product details

technicalDetails.Display: Liquid Retina display LED backlit Multi‑Touch display with IPS technology 2732-by-2048-pixel resolution at 264 ppi Wide color (P3) True Tone Fingerprint-resistant oleophobic coating Fully laminated Antireflective coating 600 nits brightness Supports Apple Pencil Pro Supports Apple Pencil (USB‑C) Apple Pencil hover

technicalDetails.Apple Intelligence: Built into your iPad, Apple Intelligence is the personal intelligence system that helps you write, express yourself, and get things done effortlessly. With groundbreaking privacy protections, it gives you peace of mind that no one else can access your data — not even Apple.

technicalDetails.Front Camera: Landscape 12MP Center Stage camera ƒ/2.0 aperture Smart HDR 4 1080p HD video recording at 25 fps, 30 fps, or 60 fps Time‑lapse video with stabilization Extended dynamic range for video up to 30 fps Cinematic video stabilization (1080p and 720p) Wide color capture for photos and Live Photos Lens correction Retina Flash with True Tone Auto image stabilization Burst mode

technicalDetails.Audio Calling: FaceTime audio Relay cellular calls from your nearby iPhone with the Phone app
technicalDetails.Microphones: Dual microphones for calls, video recording, and audio recording

technicalDetails.Touch ID: Unlock iPad Secure personal data within apps Make purchases from the iTunes Store, App Store, and Apple Books
